title: Texture-first praline hook
description: Amber praline cracks into brittle glass shards under the Licorn rolling pin. Licorn reacts at the kitchen island while shards scatter beside toasted hazelnuts. Warm praline blends into a glossy ribbon with a thick ASMR whirl.
prompt:
Use @KitchenIslandDefault only as global Licorn kitchen environment. Use @LicornMascot only as Licorn mascot cook with consistent body and hands. Use @ParisBrestState only as Paris-Brest food state for this segment.
Generate Texture-first praline hook as exactly 3 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots.
Vertical TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, no text on screen.
Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only close-up kitchen ASMR sounds synchronized with cuts and food actions.
Preserve Paris-Brest as separate piped choux domes touching in a crown, not a smooth ring; handle fragile geometry with hard cuts.
Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-2.0s: Amber praline cracks into brittle glass shards under the Licorn rolling pin.
- 2.0-4.0s: Licorn reacts at the kitchen island while shards scatter beside toasted hazelnuts.
- 4.0-6.0s: Warm praline blends into a glossy ribbon with a thick ASMR whirl.
Global negatives: no flames, no red or blue induction glow, no deformed character, no floating utensils, no unstable pastry geometry.

title: Choux paste and piping
description: Butter melts into water and salt on induction with no flame or glow. Flour falls in one shot and turns the pan into a thick paste. Licorn folds the panade confidently at the island, hands visible. Eggs blend into glossy choux paste with elastic ribbons stretching from the spatula. Piping bag fills with choux paste, the nozzle kept clean and centered. A dotted Paris-Brest crown is piped as separate domes touching in a ring, not a smooth ring. Licorn slides the tray toward the oven, crown topology still visible.
prompt:
Use @KitchenIslandDefault only as global Licorn kitchen environment. Use @LicornMascot only as Licorn mascot cook with consistent body and hands. Use @ParisBrestState only as Paris-Brest food state for this segment.
Generate Choux paste and piping as exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 12 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots.
Vertical TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, no text on screen.
Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only close-up kitchen ASMR sounds synchronized with cuts and food actions.
Preserve Paris-Brest as separate piped choux domes touching in a crown, not a smooth ring; handle fragile geometry with hard cuts.
Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.7s: Butter melts into water and salt on induction with no flame or glow.
- 1.7-3.4s: Flour falls in one shot and turns the pan into a thick paste.
- 3.4-5.1s: Licorn folds the panade confidently at the island, hands visible.
- 5.1-6.8s: Eggs blend into glossy choux paste with elastic ribbons stretching from the spatula.
- 6.8-8.5s: Piping bag fills with choux paste, the nozzle kept clean and centered.
- 8.5-10.2s: A dotted Paris-Brest crown is piped as separate domes touching in a ring, not a smooth ring.
- 10.2-12.0s: Licorn slides the tray toward the oven, crown topology still visible.
Global negatives: no flames, no red or blue induction glow, no deformed character, no floating utensils, no unstable pastry geometry.

title: Cut, fill, and close crown
description: The choux crown is sliced open on a clean horizontal axis, preserving the domed ring. The top lid lifts away, exposing the hollow golden interior. title: Finish and hero payoff
description: Powdered sugar falls as a fine white cloud over the ridged choux. A thin praline ribbon drizzles over one side without hiding the crown shape. Licorn presents the Paris-Brest on the kitchen island, character visible. Knife touches one slice point and reveals cream layers without crushing the ring. The slice separates cleanly, showing airy choux, praline cream, and crisp top. Licorn leans in satisfied as the plated slice sits beside the full crown. Close detail of cream ridges, sugar dust, and golden choux texture. Finished Paris-Brest hero shot in the Licorn kitchen with the mascot smiling. Final fork pull reveals soft cream and crisp pastry crumbs in one clean motion.
prompt:
Use @KitchenIslandDefault only as global Licorn kitchen environment. Use @LicornMascot only as Licorn mascot cook with consistent body and hands. Use @ParisBrestState only as Paris-Brest food state for this segment.

- 3.4-5.1s: Licorn presents the Paris-Brest on the kitchen island, character visible.
- 5.1-6.8s: Knife touches one slice point and reveals cream layers without crushing the ring.
- 6.8-8.5s: The slice separates cleanly, showing airy choux, praline cream, and crisp top.
